sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a seal, a seal-ring (from the root חָתַם), Exo 28:11, 21 Exo 28:21 Job 38:14 41:7 Jer 22:24, etc. The Hebrews were accustomed, like the Persians in the present day, sometimes to carry a signet ring hung by a string upon the breast ( Gen 38:18), to which custom allusion is made, Son 8:6. Arab. خَاَتِمُ and خَاتِمُ.

(2) [Hotham], pr.n. masc.-(a) 1Ch 7:32.-(b) 11:44 .
